caption.full:
Hannah Waddingham brought her daughter's cardboard purse to a.

The actress carried a handbag handcrafted by her 11-year-old daughter Kitty on the red carpet. Waddingham said she did it to combat mummy guilt and show her daughter she is never far away. She is promoting her new action-comedy series Ride or Die.

What’s the sweetest thing you’ve done to reassure your kids during work trips?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#Hollywood #CelebrityNews #HannahWaddingham #RideOrDie
caption.firstComment: This is such a tender moment — I’d love to hear your own reassuring rituals with your kids when you’re away.

facebook.text: Hannah Waddingham brought a special accessory to the red carpet: a cardboard purse handcrafted by her 11-year-old daughter, Kitty. Waddingham said she carried it to combat 'mummy guilt' and show her daughter she's never far away. "It's actually got more space in it than a normal, designer, ridiculous handbag," she joked. What do you think of this sweet gesture? Let us know in the comments!

youtube.title: Hannah Waddingham Carried Daughter's Cardboard Purse
youtube.description:
Hannah Waddingham carried a cardboard purse made by her 11-year-old daughter Kitty on the red carpet. The "Ride or Die" star said she did it to combat 'mummy guilt' and show her daughter she is never far away. She co-stars with Octavia Spencer in the new series.
